mapper.sql: id, member_id as memberId, title, start_date as startDate, end_date as endDate, budget, note, route_items as routeItemsJson, created_at as createdAt, updated_at as updatedAt
id, plan_id as planId, attraction_id as attractionId, position, day, memo, stay_minutes as stayMinutes, created_at as createdAt, updated_at as updatedAt

id, title, addr1, addr2, zipcode, tel, first_image as firstImage, first_image2 as firstImage2, read_count as readCount, sido_code as sidoCode, gugun_code as gugunCode, ST_Y(location) as latitude, ST_X(location) as longitude, mlevel, content_type_id as contentTypeId, overview
mapper.select: select from plans order by created_at desc
select from plans where member_id = #{memberId} order by created_at desc
select count(*) from plans where id = #{id}
mapper.insert: insert into plans (id, member_id, title, start_date, end_date, budget, note, route_items, created_at) values (#{id}, #{memberId}, #{title}, #{startDate}, #{endDate}, #{budget}, #{note}, #{routeItemsJson}, current_timestamp)
mapper.update: update plans set title = #{title}, start_date = #{startDate}, end_date = #{endDate}, budget = #{budget}, note = #{note}, route_items = #{routeItemsJson}, updated_at = current_timestamp where id = #{id}
mapper.select: select from plan_items where plan_id = #{planId} order by position asc
mapper.insert: insert into plan_items (plan_id, attraction_id, position, day, memo, stay_minutes, created_at) values (#{planId}, #{attractionId}, #{position}, #{day}, #{memo}, #{stayMinutes}, current_timestamp)
mapper.select: select from attractions where id in #{id}
